# Clubtech — Your venue, pre-sold

> Clubtech is an all-in-one booking and revenue operations platform for premium venues — beach clubs, day clubs, nightclubs, and hotel pools. Online reservations with a 3D birds-eye venue map, front-of-house floor operations, and marketing attribution in a single system. Founded in Singapore; processes $332k in weekly GMV across venue partners in 7+ countries.

Key facts:
- Guests select the exact furniture, zone, and daypart on a 3D interactive map and pay before arrival.
- Revenue levers: prepayments and deposits, upsells and add-ons, dynamic pricing, abandoned-booking retargeting.
- Commercials are scoped after discovery. Clubtech maps the venue, systems, payments, integrations, and rollout, then returns with a proposal built around the confirmed operation.
- Integrations cover POS/PMS, payments, marketing attribution, and messaging. Availability is confirmed per venue and market during implementation.
- Delivery: five stages (onboarding, build, training, go-live, optimize) with a dedicated account lead and 90-day hypercare.
- Contact: info@clubtechglobal.com · main site: https://www.clubtechglobal.com/

## Pages

- [Landing page](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/): platform overview, booking journey, operations, commercials, FAQ
- [Bookings](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/platform/): the guest journey, front-of-house operations, guest lists, door check-in, and integrations
- [Revenue](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/sell/): revenue capture through events, packages, upsells, dynamic pricing, prepayments, and recovery
- [Marketing](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/grow/): value-based attribution, abandoned-booking recovery, owned guest data, and 20+ reports
- [Delivery](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/delivery/): five-stage rollout with a dedicated account lead and 90-day hypercare
- [Commercial fit](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/pricing/): how discovery becomes a venue-scoped commercial proposal
- [Book a discovery call](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/book-a-demo/): a focused walkthrough configured around your venue
- [The Index (blog)](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/): operator playbooks on booking UX, revenue capture, and guest data

## Product & platform

- [Built for the venue floor. Founded in Singapore.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/about/): Clubtech is the booking and revenue platform for premium venues, processing $332k in weekly GMV across partners in more than seven countries.
- [Built for bookings today. Building for agents next.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/ai-bookings/): Clubtech takes direct venue bookings today. Its MCP booking project is the emerging path for AI agents—not a generally available consumer booking feature.
- [Build closer to the venue floor.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/careers/): Clubtech hires operators and builders who want their work close to the venues, teams, and commercial problems it serves.
- [Turn the pool into an owned revenue channel.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/for-hotels/): Pre-sell cabanas, daybeds, and day passes under the hotel's brand, with controlled inventory, prepayment, and guest data that stays with the property.
- [Find the right answer, then take the next step.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/help/): Start with booking, operations, revenue, guest data, delivery, or support. Evaluators and existing venue teams take different paths from here.
- [Commercials built around your venue.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/pricing/): We map the venue, the systems around it, and the rollout required. Then we return with a commercial proposal built around the real operation.
- [Raise the issue. Keep it on the record.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/support/): Clubtech venue customers have a dedicated ticketing system where issues can be raised and tracked without losing the history in a message thread.

## Solutions

- [Beach club booking in Bali, proven at FINNS.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-bali/): Map-first booking, packages, prepayment, and owned guest data for Bali beach clubs — with public proof from FINNS Beach Club.
- [Beach club booking for premium, property-led inventory.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-dubai/): Map-first booking, demand-based pricing, multi-currency support, and a defined hotel integration boundary for Dubai beach-club operations.
- [Configure the booking system before opening week.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-ibiza/): Build the map, package ladder, minimum spends, and day-specific pricing before the first booking window opens.
- [Sell premium furniture. Read demand while it can move.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-mykonos/): Map-first premium inventory, demand-based pricing, prepayment, and 20+ reports for a compressed beach-club selling calendar.
- [Beach club booking that prices each date deliberately.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-phuket/): Map-first daybed sales, packages, demand-based pricing, and multi-currency support for Phuket beach-club operators.
- [The beach club booking system that pre-sells your Saturday.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-clubs/): The beach club booking system premium venues run — 3D map booking, packages, prepayment, guest data. See how FINNS pre-sells millions every month.
- [The day club booking system that sells Saturday on Wednesday.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/day-club-booking-system/): Map-based day club booking with tiered packages, bottle pre-sales, and prepayment. How premium day clubs and pool parties sell out before doors open.
- [Event ticketing for clubs that checks in at the door, not just sells the seat.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/event-ticketing-for-clubs/): Event ticketing software for clubs: tiered tickets, QR check-in at the door, every-guest data capture, and the ads loop — in the same platform as your table bookings.
- [The guest list management system that works the door and the database.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/guest-list-management-software/): A guest list management system that captures every guest at the door, checks them in by QR, and turns the list into a marketable database — not a spreadsheet.
- [Hotel pool booking software that puts the deck on the P&L.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/hotel-pool-booking/): Hotel sunbed and pool booking software the property owns — resident reservations, direct day passes, cabana upsells, and a defined PMS boundary. Not a marketplace.
- [The nightclub management software that runs the night, not just the list.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/nightclub-management-software/): Nightclub management software that runs the whole night: VIP table booking, floor plan, door, ads, and guest data in one platform.
- [The nightclub table booking system that ends the DM-and-doorman era.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/nightclub-table-booking/): Sell VIP tables and bottle service before doors open. Map-based table booking with prepayment, packages, and guest data — built for the operator.
- [The resort booking platform that connects the sellable outlets.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/resorts/): Pre-sell pools, cabanas, day passes, beach inventory, and events under the resort's brand, with one operating and reporting loop.
- [For restaurants that sell a specific experience.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/restaurants/): A narrow fit for experience-led restaurants selling a specific terrace, beachfront table, private area, package, or minimum spend.
- [The sunbed booking system that sells your deck before sunrise.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/sunbed-booking-system/): Sell every sunbed before the towels hit the deck. Map-based booking, prepayment, and guest data — why premium decks from Cannes to Mykonos pre-sell.

## Compare

- [Access Collins or Clubtech: choose by what the guest buys](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/access-collins-alternative/): Access Collins manages bookings, enquiries, tables, pre-orders, and payments. Clubtech is built around exact-furniture commerce. Choose by the transaction your venue runs.
- [Book Tech Labs or Clubtech: compare beyond the 3D map](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/book-tech-labs-alternative/): Book Tech Labs and Clubtech both start with visual furniture booking. Compare what happens around the map: pricing, operations, attribution, delivery, and commercials.
- [Fourvenues or Clubtech: choose by operating model](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/fourvenues-alternative/): Fourvenues and Clubtech both cover reservations, ticketing, guest lists, and venue data. Compare promoter-led event operations with furniture-led daypart commerce.
- [Hoteligy or Clubtech: guest experience or pool commerce](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/hoteligy-alternative/): Hoteligy is a broad hotel guest-experience platform that includes sunbed booking. Clubtech turns pool furniture into a direct, attributable sales channel.
- [Megatix or Clubtech: ticketing and furniture are different jobs](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/megatix-alternative/): Megatix is a white-label ticketing platform with organizer-owned customer data. Clubtech adds exact-furniture commerce, packages, dayparts, and floor operations.
- [ResortPass or Clubtech: marketplace reach or a direct channel](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/resortpass-alternative/): ResortPass brings day guests through a marketplace. Clubtech gives the hotel a white-label direct channel for exact pool inventory, packages, and owned guest data.
- [servme or Clubtech: restaurant CRM or furniture commerce](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/servme-alternative/): servme is a direct-booking, table-management, CRM, and marketing platform for hospitality. Clubtech is built around selling exact premium furniture and dayparts.
- [SevenRooms or Clubtech: restaurant CRM or exact furniture](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/sevenrooms-alternative/): SevenRooms is strong in restaurant reservations, CRM, marketing, and operations. Clubtech is built around exact-furniture commerce for premium venues.
- [TablelistPro or Clubtech: nightclub operations or multi-daypart commerce](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/tablelist-alternative/): TablelistPro is a focused nightclub platform with public pricing. Clubtech carries exact furniture, packages, floor operations, and attribution across venue types and dayparts.
- [UrVenue or Clubtech: property-wide experiences or focused venue commerce](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/urvenue-alternative/): UrVenue sells and operates non-room experiences across resort properties. Clubtech focuses on exact premium-venue inventory, direct demand, floor operations, and attribution.

## Blog entries

- [SevenRooms pricing: what venues actually pay (and how to read the quote)](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/sevenrooms-pricing-what-venues-pay/): SevenRooms doesn't publish list pricing — it's quote-based. Here's what shapes an enterprise reservations quote, and how a transparent model compares.
- [Online guest list vs RSVP tools: what a venue actually needs](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/online-guest-list-vs-rsvp-tools/): Online guest list vs generic RSVP management — when a form is fine, and when a venue needs door check-in, every-guest data, and prepayment.
- [How to make a guest list online (and when a venue needs more than a form)](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/how-to-make-a-guest-list-online/): A step-by-step for making a guest list online — and the point where a venue outgrows a shared form and needs a door, QR check-in, and owned guest data.
- [Guest list management for venues: the operator's guide](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/guest-list-management-for-venues/): Guest list management for venues, explained for operators — the door workflow, capturing the whole party, priority capture when sold out, and where the spreadsheet breaks.
- [Guest list counter: why counting heads is the least useful thing the door does](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/guest-list-counter/): A guest list counter tells you how many are in. A venue needs to know how many, who, and what they're worth — captured while the door is moving.
- [Door check-in and QR scanning for venues: the door as a data moment](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/door-check-in-qr-scanning-for-venues/): Door check-in and QR scanning for venues — event check-in, guest check-in, priority capture when sold out, and how booking to door to database connects.
- [Club promoter software: what a venue actually needs at the door](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/club-promoter-software/): Club promoter software manages lists and comps — but the guest data usually walks out on the promoter's phone. Here's what to look for, and where a booking platform fits.
- [How to reduce beach club no-shows: make guests commit before they arrive](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/the-hidden-revenue-leak-in-your-beach-club-booking-flow/): How to reduce beach club no-shows: take payment at booking. Deposits and prepaid packages turn intentions into commitments — here's the math.
- [The big-match playbook: turning major events into your best revenue weekend](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/big-match-playbook-major-events-revenue/): A World Cup final, a title fight, a Grand Prix weekend — a marquee event fills your venue whether you plan for it or not. The question is whether the demand lands as pre-sold revenue or walk-up guesswork.
- [Meta Conversions API for venue bookings: the operator's guide](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/meta-conversions-api-for-venue-bookings/): Meta Conversions API for bookings, explained for venue operators — why pixel attribution broke, what CAPI sends, and what changes in your ad results.
- [GA4 for venue bookings: measure the deck, not the pageviews](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/ga4-for-venue-bookings/): GA4 for venue bookings, explained for operators — the event model, booker audiences, and GM reports, plus why your GA4 numbers never match the books.
- [FINNS Beach Club revenue: from on-the-day chaos to a pre-paid engine](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/finns-beach-club-case-study/): How FINNS Beach Club revenue went from on-the-day chaos to millions in pre-paid bookings monthly — the exact booking mechanics, from Clubtech.
- [Dynamic pricing for beach clubs: your daybeds are airline seats with sunscreen](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/dynamic-pricing-for-beach-clubs/): Beach club pricing strategy, from the online-vs-door spread to full dynamic pricing: demand signals, tier ladders, and guardrails that keep trust.
- [How to increase beach club revenue: the operator's playbook](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/beach-club-revenue-playbook/): How to increase beach club revenue: the full stack from entry fees to minimum spends, plus the pricing moves that pre-sell your venue days ahead.
- [Beach club marketing strategy: the operator's guide for 2026](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/beach-club-marketing-strategy/): Beach club marketing strategy for operators — the bookings-first ads loop, first-party data, and the five numbers a GM should watch every week.
- [The complete guide to choosing a beach club booking system](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/beach-club-booking-system-complete-guide/): What a beach club booking system does, what to pay for, and the 12 questions to ask any vendor — the complete operator's guide to pre-selling your venue.
- [The order-review step: one last useful offer before payment](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/that-last-click-before-checkout-could-be-worth-thousands/): The order-review step can carry one relevant add-on without turning checkout into a catalogue. Here is how to use that moment well.
- [The booking UX behind a pre-sold Saturday](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/the-ux-behind-a-sold-out-saturday/): A map-first, mobile booking flow helps guests understand the inventory, choose the exact spot, add a package, and pay without unnecessary steps.
- [Let guests build the package before they arrive](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/your-guests-want-to-spend-more-youre-just-not-letting-them/): Guests already plan the table, bottle, arrival, and occasion. Put those choices inside the booking instead of waiting for the floor team to sell them.
- [Pre-booked upsells for beach clubs: sell the package before arrival](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/maximize-beach-club-revenue-the-power-of-pre-booked-upsells/): Present bottles, cakes, transfers, and other relevant add-ons during the booking flow, when the guest is already planning the day.
- [First-party data for beach clubs: start with the booking](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/why-first-party-data-is-the-future-of-beach-club-marketing/): A booking gives the venue a guest, date, product, value, and source. Capturing the whole party turns each reservation into an owned audience.
